query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A man with short brown hair and fair skin wearing an orange collared shirt looks directly at the camera against a completely black background. Bright directional light illuminates the right side of his face and shoulder while the left side recedes into deep shadow. A small watermark reading "© meyers.dpchallenge.com" is visible in the bottom left corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A man with short brown hair and fair skin wearing an orange collared shirt looks directly at the camera in a portrait employing exposure extremes. Severe underexposure crushes the background into pure black and plunges the left side of the subject's face into deep, detailless shadow, creating a stark, dramatic chiaroscuro effect. A small watermark reading "© meyers.dpchallenge.com" is visible in the bottom left corner.
